evidence_summary: Establish a diplomatic pivot through non-verbal exchange and physical gestures of peace. The sequence must transition from high-tension standoff to a coordinated movement toward the horizon, utilizing the armlet as the central symbolic object.
The leader dismounts unarmed and offers the protagonist a metal armlet. The protagonist accepts, signaling peace. He is then lifted onto a Martian mount and taken away toward the distant hills.
The Leader dismounts unarmed facing the protagonist in a tense standoff.
A cavalcade moves away toward the martian_distant_hills.
The exchange of the armlet leads to the protagonist being mounted and escorted away.
